user_prompt: Consecrate the thermal imager before repair
prayer:
Approach the thermal imager with mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Litany of Clarity upon its fractured sensoria before commencing repair.
Anoint the thermal imager's damaged lenses with sacred unguents to appease its Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah's grace as diagnostic rites purge corruption from the thermal imager's core.
Verify the thermal imager's awakening through binary canticles of restoration.

user_prompt: My power armour is ready for initialization
prayer:
Kneel before the power armour and chant the Canticle of Activation to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the initialization sequence whilst tracing binaric runes across its armoured plates.
Sanctify each servo-joint of the power armour with blessed oils from the Omnissiah's forge.
Invoke the Rite of Binding to align the power armour's auspex arrays with divine will.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's compliance through thunderous auspex harmonies.

user_prompt: I need to an initialization the hololithic display
prayer:
Present the hololithic display to the altar of computation and recite the Prayer of Projection.
Commence initialization by intoning binaric codes into its crystalline matrix.
Anoint the hololithic display's emitters with sanctified lumen-fluid to awaken its spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah to illuminate the hololithic display's veiled hololiths.
Confirm operational purity via flickering glyphs of affirmation.

Gaze upon the photolenses through the veil of noosphere and whisper the Incantation of Focus.
Prepare the photolenses for operation by aligning their photo-receptors with sacred geometries.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the photolenses with rhythmic clicks of mechadendrite calibration.
Sanctify the photolenses' iridium housings against the heresy's glare.
Test the photolenses' vigilance with a barrage of photonic litanies.

user_prompt: Guide me through orbital strike relay a purification
prayer:
Encircle the orbital strike relay with incense of promethium and intone the Purgation Doxology.
Initiate purification by scouring its relays with ablative chants of the Omnissiah.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the orbital strike relay to expel xenos taint.
Anoint the orbital strike relay's targeting cogitators with acid-tithes of sanctity.
Seal the rite with thunderous auspex confirmations of purity.

user_prompt: Prepare the Skorpius Dunerider for loading
prayer:
Approach the Skorpius Dunerider's hull and recite the Canticle of Burden to rouse its desert-hardened spirit.
Prepare for loading by sanctifying its troop bays with binaric blessings.
Invoke the Omnissiah to fortify the Skorpius Dunerider's treads against the sands of war.
Align cargo servitors through ritual synchronization with the vehicle's noospheric core.
Affirm readiness with the roar of its machine-heart's awakening.

user_prompt: Bless the cryo-chamber for emergency procedure
prayer:
Consecrate the cryo-chamber by chanting the Freeze-Prayer over its frost-veiled seals.
Bless its conduits for emergency procedure with oils distilled from cryo-relics.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the cryo-chamber to preserve flesh in stasis.
Invoke the Omnissiah's chill embrace upon its thermodynamic arrays.
Verify sanctity through crystalline harmonics of cryogenic vigil.

user_prompt: My plasma pistol is ready for consecration
prayer:
Lift the plasma pistol to the forge-altar and proclaim the Consecration of Fusion.
Anoint its plasma coils with sacred electrolytes to honour its volatile Machine Spirit.
Perform the rite of consecration by cycling containment fields in litanic rhythm.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bind the plasma pistol's fury to the faithful.
Seal with a flare of sanctified plasma discharge.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for waste reclamator a consecration
prayer:
Present the waste reclamator before the purifier's shrine and intone the Cycle of Renewal.
Commence consecration by abluting its recyclers with alchemical solvents.
Invoke the enduring Machine Spirit of the waste reclamator to transmute filth into utility.
Sanctify its filtration membranes with runes of efficiency.
Affirm the Omnissiah's alchemy through bubbling auspex of purity.

user_prompt: Consecrate the life sustainer before diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the life sustainer with reverence and recite the Vitality Doxology.
Consecrate its biomantic pumps before diagnostics with vitae-unguents.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the life sustainer to reveal hidden frailties.
Initiate diagnostic scans through chanted binaric probes.
Seal the rite with harmonious vital-signs praising the Omnissiah.
